recipes.name: Patchwork Armor set
recipes.notes: Starter gear, easy to skill up

recipes.name: Raw Silk set
recipes.notes: Caster armor, silk drops from spiders

recipes.name: Bone Tip Arrow
recipes.notes: Starter arrows, bone chips from skeletons

recipes.name: Sheet Metal
recipes.notes: Used in banded and plate recipes

recipes.name: Banded Mantle
recipes.notes: Banded armor, highest trivial in set

recipes.name: Berry Red Dye
recipes.notes: fungus types in Upper Guk & Innothule Swamp, on ground in LFay Faerie camp

recipes.name: Black Dye
recipes.notes: various elementals, elemental warriors in The Hole, iron & stone guardians in Nektulos, golem-types, including Terror (plane of Fear)

recipes.name: Blue Dye
recipes.notes: many creatures in Permafrost, on ground in Dire Wolf Pens in Permafrost, ground spawn on the golra island in Timorous Deep

recipes.name: Brown Dye
recipes.notes: various elementals, also some lying on ground in Steamfont, elemental warriors in The Hole iron & stone guardians in Nektulos

recipes.name: Evergreen Extract
recipes.notes: found lying on ground in Greater Faydark, lighter shade of green, uncommon and hard to see

recipes.name: Rust Red Dye
recipes.notes: various elementals, also some lying on ground in Steamfont, elemental warriors in The Hole, iron & stone guardians in Nektulos

recipes.name: Yellow Dye
recipes.notes: on ground in LFay Faerie camp, scarecrow types in WK, Unrest, etc.

recipes.name: Potion of Aquatic Haunt
recipes.notes: Enduring Breath for 30 minutes (Does NOT require fish scale)

recipes.name: Potion of Antiweight
recipes.notes: Levitate for 12 Minutes (Does NOT require bat wing)

recipes.name: Serpent's Drink
recipes.notes: 6 AC Buff - Requires consuming a Snake Scales when imbibed

recipes.name: Potion of Dulsehound
recipes.notes: Instantaneous +18 to STR - 25 to INT add 180 point Regen at 3 per tick

recipes.name: Potion of Stinging Wort
recipes.notes: Instantaneous +17 STR and +300 HP , drains 2 HP /tick for 6 minutes

recipes.name: Potion of Graveyard Dust
recipes.notes: Instantaneous +27 to +48 STR and +20 to AGI and increases attack speed - Dot decline with slightly negative STR & AGI after effects
